tooltips.onlySuperAdminRemoveTenantAdmin: Only super admins can remove a tenant admin
tooltips.onlySuperAdminApproveTenantAdmin: Only super admins can approve a tenant_admin membership

invites.expiresHelper: Leave blank for no expiry. Max 365.
invites.singleUseHint: Invite codes are single-use. Send the URL to the person you want to invite.

connectedAccounts.title: Connected accounts
connectedAccounts.description: Sign-in methods linked to your account. You can sign in with any linked method.
connectedAccounts.onlyMethod: Your only sign-in method cannot be removed

linkDialog.title: Link {{provider}} account?
linkDialog.body: To confirm it's really you, you'll first sign in again with your current sign-in method. After that you'll sign in with {{provider}} to complete the link.

unlinkDialog.title: Remove {{provider}} sign-in?
unlinkDialog.body: You will no longer be able to sign in with {{provider}}.

connectedAccounts.unlinkFailed: Removing the sign-in method failed. Please try again.

errors.already_linked: A sign-in method of this type is already linked to your account.
errors.slot_occupied: A sign-in method of this type is already linked to your account.
errors.sub_taken: That account is already linked to a different user.
errors.no_primary: No existing sign-in method is available to confirm your identity.
errors.reauth_mismatch: The confirmation sign-in didn't match your account. Nothing was linked.
errors.expired: The linking session expired. Please try again.

accentColor.title: Accent color
accentColor.description: Choose the primary color used throughout the app for this band.

storage.title: Storage used
storage.description: Total size of this band's uploaded files (banners, attachments, photos, logos, invoices).

shopify.title: Shopify app credentials
shopify.description: Connect your Shopify store to read orders and import them to merchandise. Enter your app's Client ID and secret (from the Shopify Dev Dashboard) and your store domain — a short-lived access token is fetched automatically when importing. The secret is stored securely and never shown in full after saving.

clientId.label: Client ID
clientId.helper: Your app's Client ID from the Shopify Dev Dashboard.
clientId.error: Invalid Client ID. It is at least 32 hexadecimal characters.

secret.label: App secret
secret.helper: Paste your app's client secret from the Shopify Dev Dashboard.
secret.invalidFormat: Invalid secret format. The app secret starts with "shpss_" followed by 32 hexadecimal characters.
secret.saveFailed: Failed to save the app secret. Please try again.

domain.label: Store domain
domain.description: Your myshopify.com domain — required to read orders for import.
domain.error: Invalid domain. Use the form yourband.myshopify.com.

mollie.title: Mollie API key
mollie.description: Used to create payment links via Mollie. The key is stored securely and never shown in full after saving.
mollie.label: Mollie API key
mollie.helper: Paste your live or test key from the Mollie dashboard.
mollie.invalidFormat: Invalid key format. Keys must start with live_ or test_ followed by at least 25 alphanumeric characters.
mollie.saveFailed: Failed to save key. Please try again.

accounting.title: Accounting Settings
accounting.description: Default accounts used when creating invoices and purchases.
accounting.booksClosedThroughHelper: Nothing can be posted on or before this date. Leave empty to keep the books open.

errors.account_has_open_balance: This account still carries an open balance (unpaid bills, unsettled member debt or unpaid invoices). Settle them before changing the account.
errors.invalid_books_closed_through: Enter a valid date (YYYY-MM-DD) or clear the field.

chartOfAccounts.title: Chart of Accounts
chartOfAccounts.description: The accounts used to categorize financial transactions. Add sub-accounts or deactivate accounts you don't need.
chartOfAccounts.setCapitalizable: Allow capitalizing purchases to this asset account
chartOfAccounts.unsetCapitalizable: Stop offering this asset account on purchases
chartOfAccounts.inUse: Account is in use and cannot be modified.

bandsintown.title: Bandsintown
bandsintown.description: Connect Bandsintown to fetch your artist profile and import upcoming events as gigs.
bandsintown.label: Bandsintown API key (app_id)
bandsintown.helper: The app_id you registered with Bandsintown for API access.
bandsintown.invalidFormat: This doesn't look like a valid Bandsintown API key.
